description: Composition White and red round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short raglan sleeves and graphic print on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours in a delicate cycle Do not bleach Tumble dry low or lay flat to dry Warm iron when needed Do not iron on print Let your little boy begin his sporting activities in style with this double colored t-shirt from doodle. Train him in his skilled athletic sport and sporting spirit, while the cotton fabric keeps him fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with shorts and sneakers for an even more sporty look.
